settings.heading: Medal Price in India (Per Piece & Bulk)
settings.subheading: What do medals cost per piece in India? A clear bulk price guide for sports, school and event medals — gold/silver/bronze, custom centres and finisher medals. Made by Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: In India, medals start at around ₹25 per piece in bulk for standard sports medals, ₹45 for custom-centre medals, and ₹90+ for large finisher medals — falling further at higher quantities. Meru Trophy quotes exact per-piece rates on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252).

settings.heading: What you'll pay and why
settings.text: Medal pricing is driven by size, finish, custom centre and quantity. Standard gold/silver/bronze medals are the most economical; adding a custom centre with your event or logo costs a little more; large die-struck finisher medals cost the most. All prices fall with volume — the more you order, the lower the per-piece rate.

settings.question: How much is one medal in India?
settings.answer: Standard medals start around ₹25 each in bulk; custom and finisher medals cost more.

settings.question: How low does the price go in bulk?
settings.answer: Per-piece rates fall steadily with quantity — share your count for an exact rate.

settings.question: Do medals include ribbons?
settings.answer: Yes — custom-colour ribbons are included; lanyards on request.

settings.question: Can I add our event logo?
settings.answer: Yes — custom medal centres carry your event name, sport or logo.

settings.heading: Want an exact price?
settings.text: Send your item, quantity and engraving — we'll send a precise quote, usually within the hour.
